Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Data for Anomalies Expected Flow Register Order Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment Case 1001 Observation Follows expected flow perfectly Case 1002 Anomaly Confirm Shipment and Ship Goods happened before Perform Credit Check and Validate Stock Case 1003 Anomaly Ship Goods happened before Confirm Shipment Validate Stock is missing entirely in this log Case 1004 Anomaly Payment received before Invoice issued and before shipping related steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Shipping before credit check stock validation is a major policy violation risk Usually you confirm scheduling before shipping Payment before Invoice is impossible logically usually or highly unusual

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case 1002 System glitch allowing out of order events Manual override by SalesRep Urgent order priority type bypassed checks Case 1003 Missing log entry for Validate Stock Or skipped entirely Confirm Shipment logged late due to manual entry delay Case 1004 Pre payment scenario System bug recording timestamps incorrectly Invoice generated after payment reverse flow

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Need to check ordering of activities per case_id Need to check for missing steps Need to join with orders to check order_type Need to join with resources to check departments involved Need to calculate durations between steps

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Need to check for patterns generally while referencing the specific findings from the sample data as the motivation Identify specific deviations in the sample data 1002 1003 1004 Propose queries that would find them in a larger dataset

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Constraints Ensure SQL syntax is PostgreSQL compliant Ensure table names match exactly order_event_log orders resources One more check Case 1004 Payment before Invoice This is definitely an anomaly Case 1002 Ship before Credit Check This is definitely an anomaly Case 1003 Ship before Confirm Missing Validate Stock

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Wait looking closely at the prompt structure Interpretation The user is giving me the context and the instructions for what I the LLM should do Wait re reading The target model should be encouraged to This implies I am the target model Wait one more check Is the user asking me to simulate the target model Yes

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This might mean system errors policy violations training issues bypassed controls data entry errors or system bugs
